data.name: 撿到貓女僕！
data.detailed_description:
💟CHECK THIS OUT!💟


關於此遊戲

這是一個體驗與貓女僕一起生活的小小遊戲，妳可以與貓女僕進行一些甜蜜的互動，例如摸摸頭...或是稍微欺負她。
可以在任何時候進行三種體位的性交，每種性交動畫有6種的動畫差別。
在進行多次的互動後，貓女僕也會有一些感情上的變化，她的反應會有些許的不同。
這是一個小遊戲，也許在5分鐘以內就可以結束整個流程，
但是這個遊戲沒有結束，妳可以在妳想要的時候隨時貓女僕做互動。

CV:大山チロル
絵師:奶昔

data.short_description: 撿到了一隻貓女僕，住在一起甜甜的迷你H遊戲，
data.supported_languages:
英文, 日文*, 繁體中文, 俄文, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windos 7 +
  • 處理器: Core 2 +
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: HD620 +
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0c
  • 儲存空間: 800 MB 可用空間

data.name: I got a cat maid
data.detailed_description:
💟CHECK THIS OUT!💟


About the Game

***The game doesn't have any gameplay, it's more like an animated player.***

This is a little game to experience living with a cat maid. You can have some sweet interactions with the cat maid,
such as touching your head... or bullying her.
You can perform three types of sexual intercourse at any time, and there are 6 kinds of animation differences for each sexual intercourse animation.
After many interactions, the cat maid will also have some emotional changes, and her reaction will be slightly different.
This is a small game, maybe the end of the process can be completed within 5 minutes.
But this game is not over, so you can interact with the female cat maid whenever you want.


CV: Chiroru Ohyama
Artwork: Milk Shake

data.short_description: You pick up a cat maid to live together and have physical intimacies in this mini-game. 3 H scenes with 18 variations.
data.supported_languages:
English, Japanese*, Traditional Chinese, Russian, Portuguese - Portugal, Portuguese - Brazil
*languages with full audio support

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS *: Windos 7 +
  • Processor: Core 2 +
  • Memory: 2 GB RAM
